toti.subtitle: Pet Health Insurance
toti.description: A warm, conversion-focused landing page for a pet health insurance brand. Built around trust and emotional connection — because pet owners don't just want coverage, they want peace of mind. Designed and developed with a soft visual identity and a clear, intuitive navigation flow.

verdant.subtitle: Indoor Plant Store
verdant.description: A minimalist e-commerce landing page for an indoor plant brand. Anchored in negative space and editorial typography, Verdant communicates calm, quality, and intentional living. Every detail — from the color palette to the micro-interactions — was crafted to reflect the organic essence of the brand.

starbucks.subtitle: Frontend Development Practice
starbucks.description: A pixel-faithful recreation of the Starbucks homepage, built as a frontend development study. Focused on layout precision, responsive behavior, and component structure — translating a polished, real-world design into clean, maintainable code.

natura.concept: Brand Launch and Experience for Natura's nighttime skincare line. The creative concept revolved around the idea of a 'nighttime beauty ritual' — a conscious pause for self-care. The visual identity combined organic elements and soft textures with a color palette evoking calm and accessible luxury.
natura.direction: For the Tododia Todanoite line launch, the challenge was to materialize the 'sleep ritual' concept in a physical environment. As Art Director, I led the creation of a cycle-based visual journey, using a palette of deep blues and circular lighting to guide the guest's perception.

avon.concept: Avon's annual campaign focused on breast cancer awareness and prevention. The visual concept seeks to humanize the cause through a welcoming and informative aesthetic, using the pink ribbon symbol integrated into photographic compositions that celebrate care and life.
avon.direction: As Art Director, I led the visual concept for the 11th edition of the project. The challenge was to balance the seriousness of the topic with a vibrant, empowering visual language. I developed the Key Visual focused on real connection, using solid typography and graphic elements that guide the audience toward direct engagement via QR Code.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with Débora Meireles — Frontend Developer & Art Director.
contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: I'm open to projects, collaborations, and opportunities. Choose your preferred channel.

about.tagline: 4 years building brands. Now, building the code behind them.

artDir.title: Art Director & Graphic Designer
artDir.description: Art direction for campaigns and visual identities for major brands — from concept to final deliverable.

frontend.title: Frontend Developer (Projects)
frontend.description: Building interfaces focused on performance, accessibility, and visual consistency — from Figma to deploy.
